longFortune:
Greetings, seeker of wisdom and insight. I am Professor Fortuna, here to reveal the mysteries of fate that lie ahead for you. 

Listen closely, for the stars have aligned to bring clarity to your path. As you journey through the realms of existence, remember to always trust in your inner strength and intuition. The challenges you face may seem daunting, but know that you possess the resilience and determination to overcome them. Embrace change with an open heart, for it is through adversity that you will find growth and transformation. 

Do not fear the unknown, for it is a necessary part of your journey towards a brighter future. Embrace each new opportunity with courage and conviction, for it is through these experiences that you will discover your true purpose. 

Believe in yourself, dear seeker, for the universe has great things in store for you. Trust in the guidance of the cosmos, and you shall find the success and happiness that you seek.

May fortune favour you on your quest.
shortFortune: Greetings, I am Professor Fortuna, here to reveal the mysteries of fate ahead for you. Trust in your inner strength and intuition, embrace change and face challenges with courage. The universe has great things in store for you. Good luck on your journey.
